dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9434 IH: Reviewing the Expansion of Government Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. Kim introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Financial Services

form.official-title: To amend the Federal securities laws to require rulemakings to consider the cumulative effects of the rule with certain other final and proposed rules.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Reviewing the Expansion of Government Act of 2026 or the REG Act of 2026.

subsection.header: Rules under the Securities Act of 1933
subsection.text: Section 2(b) of the Securities Act of 1933 (15 U.S.C. 77b(b)) is amended by inserting , when considered individually or cumulatively with other related rules or regulations or other related and recent proposed rules or regulations, before will promote.

subsection.header: Rules under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934
subsection.text: Section 23(a)(2) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 (15 U.S.C. 78w(a)(2)) is amended by inserting , when considered individually or cumulatively with other related rules or regulations or other related and recent proposed rules or regulations, after which would.

subsection.header: Rules under the Investment Company Act of 1940
subsection.text: Section 2(c) of the Investment Company Act of 1940 (15 U.S.C. 80a–2(c)) is amended by inserting , when considered individually or cumulatively with other related rules or regulations or other related and recent proposed rules or regulations, before will promote.

subsection.header: Rules under the Investment Advisers Act of 1940
subsection.text: Section 202(c) of the Investment Advisers Act of 1940 (15 U.S.C. 80b–2(c)) is amended by inserting , when considered individually or cumulatively with other related rules or regulations or other related and recent proposed rules or regulations, before will promote.
